creator: flo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Hung-Yi Chen from comment #1)
Hey, I'm happy to see that you tried to get the go parts going, I looked at it a while ago but didn't figure it our and ran out of time. Unfortunately it does not build in poudriere see

https://tb.smeets.xyz/~flo/percona-toolkit-3.5.7-14amd64-portscommit.log

It looks like it's trying to make network connections during the build. I think you need to list the go dependencies in the Makefile.
